data.EntryNode: Entry node.%If this node is taken, you lose connection and must restart.
data.RelayNode: Relay node.%Intermediate directory to relay a signal.
data.GoalNode: Goal node.%Whole network is controlled by the owner of this node.
data.EncryptedNode: Encrypted node.%Needs the right tool to be unlocked.
data.FirewallNode: Firewall node.%Hardens linked nodes, leading to slower hacking times.
data.TracerNode: Tracer node.%Increases the suspicion level of neighboring nodes.
data.HunterNode: Hunter node.%An antivirus. Tries to take your entry node and kick you out of the net.
data.HoneypotNode: Honeypot node.%Triggers every security system available in the network.
data.DataNode: Data node.%Contains credits you can secure by beating the level.
data.BinaryNode: Binary node.%Holds decryption software you can deploy.
data.BandwidthNode: Bandwidth node.%Increases the network speed of the owner.
data.IntelNode: Intel node.%Discloses the type of all unidentified nodes.
